message:
🐛 Fix console log spam across all dashboards (#356)

🐛 Fix console log spam across all dashboards

- Remove console.warn("Unknown card type") from 18 dashboard files
- Register security_overview/rbac_summary card aliases
- Add demo mode guards to operators.ts, OPAPolicies.tsx
- Remove GPU/OPA debug logging
- Hide viewer count on Netlify (no backend)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

- - {viewerCount} -
